commit.message:
Add Yamata Launcher (#2105)

* Add Yamata Launcher

1. yamata-launcher
2. https://yamata-launcher.gregoryc.dev/
3. https://github.com/Gr3gorywolf/Yamata-launcher/releases
4. Yamata Launcher is a multi-platform game launcher designed to unify game catalogs, downloads, and libraries from multiple ecosystems into a single, extensible application.

* Fix formatting of yamata-launcher description

removing "Yamata-launcher is"from the description as it seems redundant.
